title: erigeron astranthioides
intro: Erigeron astranthioides, also known as the Mexican daisy or Fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Erigeron astranthioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to address various health concerns.
